changelog:
- fixed shared media showing media from converted legacy group (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/13092, 70👍)
- fixed db not responding issue with android 16 widgets (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/51349, 50👍)
- fixed screen sharing in calls for specific devices (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/50463, 32👍)
- fixed switching theme to light from dark in auto-night mode (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/21211, 25👍)
- don’t let ad reduce collapsed global search result (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/56112, 24👍)
- show premium/emoji statuses for users with no premium purchase ability (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/44590, 13👍)
- refactored how days are counted in schedule date picker (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/49719, 6👍)
- fixed disable motion photo setting (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/60669, 5👍)
- fix losing caption after setting cover in stories (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/49918, 2👍)
- fix star icon in forums (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/60273, 1👍)
- show muted icon with emoji status in dialog list (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/60699)
- show only group participants when typing caption for media (https://bugs.telegram.org/c/53758)
